subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath sent down from the heaven of bounty the banquet of His Utterance, wherewith He hath adorned the world and quickened the nations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل من سماء العطاء مائده البیان و بها زین العالم و احی الامم
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
